_meta.basis: Gross Direct Premium Written (not earned / net / retained)
_meta.description: Monthly industry-wide non-life Gross Direct Premium (per insurer + category totals + GRAND TOTAL) from IRDAI Non-Life Flash Figures.
_meta.notes: Empty until ingest-irdai-nonlife-flash.ts has its first successful run. IRDAI's WAF 403s the Actions runner; drop the official file into data/raw/irdai/nonlife-flash/<YYYY-MM>.xlsx (PDF only if no XLSX) to populate. Never fabricated.
